title: System Scope Summary (Module 1 → Module 2 Handoff)
description: Final handoff payload from Module 1 (Defining Scope) to Module 2 (Developing System Requirements). Field shape MUST stay compatible with Module 2's expected input at `2 - Developing System Requirements/2-dev-sys-reqs-for-kb-llm-software/03-Phase-0-Ingest-Module-1-Scope.md` (system_context_summary.v1). Module 2 ingests this file and references it from every downstream JSON artifact's metadata.

_compatible_with.description: Module 2 ingests this same shape under the name system_context_summary.v1.

system_name.description: Final name agreed in P4 Step 8. While P0-P3 are running this MUST stay literally 'The System'. Naming earlier violates fail-closed Rule R1.

system_description.description: One-sentence description sourced from P0 intake + P3 scope tree analysis. Describes the need being met, not the solution chosen.

stakeholders.description: Semicolon-delimited list of all stakeholders (primary + secondary)

regulatory_refs.description: e.g. SOC2 Type II; HIPAA; GDPR

the_system.description: Single string label of the central box (e.g. 'The System' or final name from P4).

external_actors.description: 8-20 external entities per eCornell rule. Anything fewer means Step 6 iteration break was likely skipped.

role.description: Why this entity matters to The System.

label.description: Lowercase verb-phrase per eCornell formatting rule. Multiple actions on one line separated by commas.

stakeholders.description: Optional structured stakeholder list (also captured semicolon-delimited in project_metadata.stakeholders for Module 2 compatibility).

extends.description: Use case IDs this one extends (per UseCaseDiagram-visual-instructions)

includes.description: Use case IDs this one includes

use_case_diagram_path.description: Path to the .mmd Mermaid file produced in P2.

scope_tree_functions.description: Top-level deliverable nodes from the scope tree — feed Module 2 as candidate abstract function names.

scope_tree_path.description: Path to the .mmd Mermaid file produced in P3.

context_diagram_path.description: Path to the .mmd Mermaid file produced in P1.

hard_constraints.description: Must-haves that constrain the solution space. Surface from PM intake + iteration.

module_1_artifacts_referenced.description: Paths to all Module 1 source materials consulted (PPTs, PDFs, lecture transcripts).

open_questions.description: Unresolved items the PM acknowledged but deferred. Module 2 may reopen any of these.
